Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 1 25 25}Get ready to be surprised... It'll be here any second.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}This is no time to joke around![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}What was that!? You've gotta be kidding me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Mr. Chairman, please head for the command room![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Takeba, go upstairs and wake him up! Then, escape out the back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}You're the one who led it to us, Akihiko, so I'm going to have you fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}It's not like I asked it to follow me![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}What are you waiting for, Takeba? Go![n]{f 1 1}
